stemHtml: A glider in VMC approaches an aeroplane towing an object at the same altitude on a converging course. Who has right of way?

options.a: The glider, if the aeroplane is on its left.
options.b: The glider, regardless of relative position.
options.c: The towing aeroplane, if the glider is on its right.
options.d: The towing aeroplane, regardless of position.
